codeReview.summary: The Husky setup implementation correctly installs and configures Husky with lint-staged for pre-commit hooks. All validation contract assertions are satisfied. The implementation follows the worker skill procedure exactly and produces a working pre-commit hook that runs biome check --write and tsc --noEmit on staged TypeScript/JavaScript files.

summary: PASS - The husky-setup feature is complete and correct. The .husky/pre-commit hook exists and is executable, lint-staged is properly configured in package.json with both biome check --write and tsc --noEmit commands, and both husky and lint-staged are installed as devDependencies. All 9 validation contract assertions (VAL-QUAL-005 through VAL-QUAL-014) are satisfied. The worker followed the backend-worker skill procedure correctly with no deviations.
